Class Transformation

java.lang.Object
recoder.kit.Transformation
Direct Known Subclasses:
TwoPassTransformation
public abstract class Transformation extends Object
Default implementation of a transformation command object. This class takes a cross reference service configuration suitable for transformations and provides access methods to frequently used services.

Transformations should obey the following protocol:

  1. Initialization (constructor): Validate and store the transformation parameters.
  2. Transformation (execute): Collect all semantic information via queries to the info services, perform the necessary syntactic changes and report the effects of the transformation, setting the problem report properly. A transformation should yield IDENTITY if it is not necessary to perform it. This allows to avoid termination problems when falling back to a back-tracking strategy for iterated transformations.
    Visible transformations must report all changes they have done to the change history and must mark their beginning before the first change. Changes are already reported by the convenience tree manipulators attach(Role)/detach/replace.
  3. Post mortem: Allow to access analysis results and generated syntax trees that might be useful for other transformations, even after the transformation has been performed.

Transformations may be used on syntax elements that are not yet visible to the model; in that case, no change reports are generated. A partially visible transformation may change the state of its visibility in between actions, but this should rarely be necessary.

Since:
0.53

    Returns the source file repository service contained in the service configuration.

    boolean
    isVisible()
    Checks if this transformation is meant to be visible and shall report changes to the model.
    protected final void
    replace(ProgramElement child, ProgramElement replacement)
    Replaces a single child by a different one.
    void
    rollback()
    Reverts all changes of this transformation including all changes of transformations that have been triggered during the transformation phase from there on.
    protected ProblemReport
    setProblemReport(ProblemReport report)
    Sets the problem report.
    void
    setServiceConfiguration(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc)
    Sets the service configuration to use for this transformation.
    String
    toString()
    Returns a short description of this transformation.

  • Field Details

    • NO_PROBLEM

      public static final NoProblem NO_PROBLEM

    • EQUIVALENCE

      public static final Equivalence EQUIVALENCE

    • IDENTITY

      public static final Identity IDENTITY

  • Constructor Details

    • Transformation

      protected Transformation()
      Creates a new transformation leaving open the given service configuration. This is useful for bean-like transformation management.

    • Transformation

      public Transformation(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc)
      Creates a new transformation using the given service configuration.
      Parameters:
      sc - the service configuration to use.

  • Method Details

    • doReplace

      public static void doReplace(ProgramElement child, ProgramElement replacement)
      Replaces a single child by a different one without reporting. This method performs the exchange but does not handle the change history notification. The method does not do anything with compilation units and assumes that the parent link is defined for all other types.
      Parameters:
      child - the child to remove from its parent.
      replacement - the child to replace its original (must be of appropriate type).

    • doDetach

      public static void doDetach(ProgramElement root)
      Detaches a subtree without reporting. This method performs the deletion of the child link but does not handle the change history notification. The method does not do anything with childs that have no parent links such as compilation units.
      Parameters:
      root - the root of the subtree to remove.

    • doAttach

      public static void doAttach(Identifier child, NamedProgramElement parent)
      Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
      Parameters:
      child - the child node to attach.
      parent - the parent node to attach the child to.

      Parameters:
      child - the child node to attach.
      parent - the parent node to attach the child to.
      Since:
      0.72

    • doAttach

      public static void doAttach(TypeReference child, Throws parent, int index)
      Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index but does not report this.
      Parameters:
      child - the child node to attach.
      parent - the parent node to attach the child to.
      index - the requested child position.
      Since:
      0.72

    • getServiceConfiguration

      public CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration getServiceConfiguration()

    • setServiceConfiguration

      public void setServiceConfiguration(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc)
      Sets the service configuration to use for this transformation.
      Parameters:
      sc - the service configuration to use, may not be null . UA: thou shalt not forbid public access if others want to inherit!!!

    • isVisible

      public boolean isVisible()
      Checks if this transformation is meant to be visible and shall report changes to the model. If a transformation is not visible, it may not change parts of the current model. This default implementation returns true.
      Returns:
      true.

    • getProgramFactory

      protected ProgramFactory getProgramFactory()
      Returns the program factory service contained in the service configuration.
      Returns:
      the current program factory.
      See Also:
      • getServiceConfiguration()

    • getChangeHistory

      protected ChangeHistory getChangeHistory()
      Returns the change history service contained in the service configuration.
      Returns:
      the current change history.
      See Also:
      • getServiceConfiguration()

    • getSourceInfo

      protected SourceInfo getSourceInfo()
      Returns the source info service contained in the service configuration. This method will return the same object as getCrossReferenceSourceInfo().
      Returns:
      the current source info.
      See Also:
      • getServiceConfiguration()

    • getCrossReferenceSourceInfo

      protected CrossReferenceSourceInfo getCrossReferenceSourceInfo()
      Returns the cross reference source info service contained in the service configuration.
      Returns:
      the current cross reference source info.
      See Also:
      • getServiceConfiguration()

    • getNameInfo

      protected NameInfo getNameInfo()
      Returns the name info service contained in the service configuration.
      Returns:
      the current name info.
      See Also:
      • getServiceConfiguration()

    • getSourceFileRepository

      protected SourceFileRepository getSourceFileRepository()
      Returns the source file repository service contained in the service configuration.
      Returns:
      the current source file repository.
      See Also:
      • getServiceConfiguration()

    • execute

      public ProblemReport execute()
      Performs the transformation. Prepares all necessary information, checks the transformation requirements, and performs the syntactic changes if the report was NoProblem and not Identity. This method should also set the problem report to be fetched later on. The default implementation does nothing and reports Identity.
      Returns:
      a problem report.

    • getProblemReport

      public ProblemReport getProblemReport()
      Returns the problem report.
      Returns:
      the problem report of this transformation, or null if the transformation has not yet been applied.

    • setProblemReport

      protected ProblemReport setProblemReport(ProblemReport report)
      Sets the problem report. This should be done by execute().
      Parameters:
      report - the problem report.
      Returns:
      the problem report (passed through).

    • rollback

      public void rollback() throws NoSuchTransformationException
      Reverts all changes of this transformation including all changes of transformations that have been triggered during the transformation phase from there on. This method will do nothing for invisible transformations, as only visible transformations report their changes to the change history.

      If this object is a TwoPassTransformation, a redo should be possible via a second call to TwoPassTransformation.transform().

      Throws:
      NoSuchTransformationException - if the given transformation is not known, for instance if it has already been removed.
      See Also:
      • ChangeHistory.rollback(Transformation)

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a short description of this transformation. The default implementation will return the last part of the class name.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a short description of this transformation.

    • replace

      protected final void replace(ProgramElement child, ProgramElement replacement)
      Replaces a single child by a different one. This method performs the exchange and handles the change history notification. The method can also handle compilation units properly, but otherwise assumes that the parent link is defined.
      Parameters:
      child - the child to remove from its parent.
      replacement - the child to replace its original (must be of appropriate type).

    • detach

      protected final void detach(ProgramElement root)
      Detaches a subtree. This method performs the deletion of the child link and handles the change history notification. The method can also handle compilation units properly, but otherwise assumes that the parent link is defined.
      Parameters:
      root - the root of the subtree to remove.

      protected final void attach(CompilationUnit child)
      Registers a compilation unit.
      Parameters:
      child - the unit to register.
